parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant halon
participant ios1
participant ios2
participant client

group SNS operation start
    hnote over halon, client : notification [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
    loop until all ios are ready
        halon -> ios2 : repair status request
        ios2 -> halon : repair status reply
    end
    halon -> ios1 : spiel_repair_start
    activate ios1
    halon -> ios2 : spiel_repair_start
    activate ios2
end

... repair process ...

alt sucessful case
    ios1 -> halon : notify [(pool, repaired), (disk, repaired)]
    deactivate ios1
    ios2 -> halon : notify [(pool, repaired), (disk, repaired)]
    deactivate ios2
    group SNS status query
        loop unil all ios are in IDLE
            halon -> ios2 : repair status request
            ios2 -> halon : repair status reply [IDLE, IDLE]
        end
        halon -> client : notify [(pool, REPAIRED), (disk, REPAIRED)]
    end
else partial repair
    ios1 -> halon : notify [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
    hnote over halon, client : Abort SNS operation
else transient disk
    -> halon : notify [(disk, transient)]
    hnote over halon, client : Pause SNS operation
else failed disk
    -> halon : notify [(disk, failed)]
    hnote over halon, client : Abort SNS operation
end

@enduml
```
